honestlm: Guardrails for Teaching Linear Models

Source: R/package.R
honestlm-package.Rd

Provides small, opinionated wrappers around familiar linear model workflows. The package keeps base R and ggplot2 interfaces recognizable while adding guardrails around common interpretation traps, including coefficient p-values for multi-level categorical predictors, sequential Type I sums of squares, and plots whose summaries do not match the fitted linear model.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://yanivjb.github.io/honestlm/

  • https://github.com/yanivjb/honestlm
